title: Alexs Mods x Tide Compat
description: Adds fish from Alex's Mobs and Alex's Caves to Tide's fishing journal.
body:
Adds in the collectible fish from Alex's Mobs and Alex's Caves. Note that only the fish that drop a fish item are added to the journal.

### Alex's Mobs:
- Blobfish
- Flying Fish
- Cosmic Cod

### Alex's Caves:
- Radgill
- Tripodfish
- Lanternfish
- Sea Pig

Note: Unfortunately Sweetish Fish was bugged when I attempted to implement it, so they are exempt from the journal for now.
